zh.Carnarvon Castle, Caernarvonshire, Wales: 威爾士凱爾納方史爾卡納福 卡素
zh.Macclesfield, Cheshire, England: 英國爾馬可萊斯費爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Countess Millicent Hanmer於1240年出生在英國爾馬可萊斯費爾德時，她的父親Sir Gerard Hanmer Of Macclesfield26歲，母親Countess Jean Hanmer36歲。她與Earl Thomas de Macclesfield I在英國英格蘭爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1317年在她的家鄉享年77歲。

zh-hans.Carnarvon Castle, Caernarvonshire, Wales: 威尔士凱爾納方史爾卡納福 卡素
zh-hans.Macclesfield, Cheshire, England: 英国爾馬可萊斯費爾德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Countess Millicent Hanmer于1240年出生在英国爾馬可萊斯費爾德时，她的父亲Sir Gerard Hanmer Of Macclesfield26岁，母亲Countess Jean Hanmer36岁。她与Earl Thomas de Macclesfield I在英国英格兰爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1317年在她的家乡享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hanmer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: habitational name from Hanmer (Flintshire), named with the Old English personal name Hagena + Old English mere ‘lake, pond’. A daughter of Sir David Hanmer, a Welsh judge in the 14th century, was married to the Welsh ruler Owen Glendower, who led the revolt against Henry IV's rule in Wales.
English: habitational name from Anmer (Norfolk), from Old English æned ‘duck’ + mere ‘lake, pond’.

nameMeanings.name: Millicent
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Melisende, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from amal ‘labour’ + swinth ‘strength’. This was the name of a daughter of Charlemagne. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Countess Millicent Hanmer was born in 1240, in Macclesfield, Cheshire, England, her father, Sir Gerard Hanmer Of Macclesfield, was 26 and her mother, Countess Jean Hanmer, was 36. She married Earl Thomas de Macclesfield I in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1317, in her hometown, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Countess Millicent Hanmer est née en 1240, à Macclesfield, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Gerard Hanmer Of Macclesfield, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Countess Jean Hanmer, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Earl Thomas de Macclesfield I à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1317, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Countess Millicent Hanmer 1240 in Macclesfield, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Gerard Hanmer Of Macclesfield 26 und ihre Mutter Countess Jean Hanmer 36. Sie hat in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Earl Thomas de Macclesfield I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1317 im Alter von 77 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Countess Millicent Hanmer è nata il nel 1240 nel Macclesfield, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Sir Gerard Hanmer Of Macclesfield, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Countess Jean Hanmer, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato Earl Thomas de Macclesfield I nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1317, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 77 anni.

ja.Maelor Saesneg, Flintshire, Wales: ウェールズフリントシュアイア
ja.Macclesfield, Cheshire, England: イギリスチェシュアイアマククレスフィールド
ja.lifeSummary: Countess Millicent Hanmerが1240年にイギリスチェシュアイアマククレスフィールドで生まれた時，父Sir Gerard Hanmer Of Macclesfieldは26歳，母Countess Jean Hanmerは36歳であった。イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアでEarl Thomas de Macclesfield Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1317年に故郷で77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Countess Millicent Hanmer(이)가 1240년 영국 체실르 맥클스필드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Gerard Hanmer Of Macclesfield(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Countess Jean Hanmer(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 Earl Thomas de Macclesfield I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1317년 그녀의 고향에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Countess Millicent Hanmer nasceu em 1240, em Macclesfield, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Gerard Hanmer Of Macclesfield, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Countess Jean Hanmer, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Earl Thomas de Macclesfield I em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1317, em sua cidade natal, com 77 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Countess Millicent Hanmer родилась в 1240 г. в местности макклесфиелд, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Gerard Hanmer Of Macclesfield было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Countess Jean Hanmer, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Earl Thomas de Macclesfield I в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1317 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 77 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Countess Millicent Hanmer nació en 1240, en Macclesfield, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Gerard Hanmer Of Macclesfield, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Countess Jean Hanmer, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Earl Thomas de Macclesfield I en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1317, en su pueblo, a la edad de 77 años.
